LanguageData.Sanguophage.description:
The old stories called creatures like you Wendigos: starving things that outlived the people they once were. However it happened, you carry that curse now. Hunted, half-feral, and never truly full, you fled into the wastes before the wrong people could pin you down.
Note: Wendigos have unique strengths and brutal weaknesses, making this a difficult scenario.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.label: The Wendigo
